description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a combination of large windows, a recessed entryway, and a garage with a prominent dark window panel. The exterior is primarily white with subtle accents of light gray and beige, and there are landscaped areas with shrubs and small plants along the perimeter. The house is surrounded by a low fence and includes a small front yard and a paved driveway. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a private patio area, enhancing the sense of openness and connection to the outdoors. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a white exterior, featuring a garage and landscaped front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage with a dark window panel, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical windows, a private patio area, and more extensive landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of white and gray wall textures, additional windows, and a side gate.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single door, small steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaped planters.
